testcase.name: test_back_to_home_clears_checkpoint

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Page.goto: net::ERR_ABORTED at http://localhost:8081/ Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:8081/", waiting until "load"

testcase.failure: tests/test_completion.py:73: in test_back_to_home_clears_checkpoint go_home(page) tests/conftest.py:36: in go_home page.goto(BASE_URL) ../../.pyenv/versions/3.12.12/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:9019: in goto self._sync( ../../.pyenv/versions/3.12.12/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_page.py:555: in goto return await self._main_frame.goto(**locals_to_params(locals())) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../.pyenv/versions/3.12.12/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:153: in goto await self._channel.send( ../../.pyenv/versions/3.12.12/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../../.pyenv/versions/3.12.12/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Page.goto: net::ERR_ABORTED at http://localhost:8081/ E Call log: E - navigating to "http://localhost:8081/", waiting until "load"

Apple

Banana', 'Apple
Banana', 'Apple', 'Banana'] assert 2 >= 4
